description.value:
Prerequisite: Advanced Puppetry II class ability, Int 13.

Benefit: Once per round, you can use an attack action and make a Concentration check (DC 20) and become focused until the end of the encounter. As an instant action, you can spend your focus to do one of the following: Analyze: You automatically know the hit dice of any puppets an opponent controls for the next three rounds. Counter: Gain a +2 insight bonus to attack and damage against puppets of an opponent for three rounds. Defend: You and your puppets gain a +2 insight bonus to Defense and saves against an opponent's puppet attacks. You may gain focus when an encounter starts, as long as you were not caught by surprise.
